new_classes.label_en: Other spirituous beverages (other), in containers holding > 2 l (CN 2208 90 69)
new_classes.label_de: Andere alkoholhaltige Getränke (andere), in Behältnissen mit einem Inhalt von mehr als 2 l (KN 2208 90 69)
new_classes.definition_en: Other spirituous beverages (not arrack, plum/pear/cherry spirit, other fruit spirit, liqueur, vodka, gin, nor whisky-soda) classified under CN 2208 90 69, including spirituous beverages with added aerated water (e.g. whisky-soda), tea with alcohol, spirituous beverages mixed together or with fruit/vegetable juices, and other beverages described in HS Explanatory Note to heading 2208 third paragraph items 14–18, presented in containers holding more than 2 litres.

new_classes.label_en: Other spirituous beverage mixture quality (whisky-soda, tea with alcohol, spirit+juice, HS 2208 items 14–18)
new_classes.label_de: Eigenschaft: Anderes alkoholhaltiges Gemischgetränk (z. B. Whisky-Soda, Tee mit Alkohol, Geist-Saft-Gemisch, HS 2208 Ziffern 14–18)
new_classes.definition_en: Quality borne by a spirituous beverage that falls into the residual 'other' category of heading 2208: spirituous beverages with added aerated water (e.g. whisky-soda), tea with alcohol, spirituous beverages mixed together or mixed with fruit or vegetable juices, and other beverages listed in HS Explanatory Note to heading 2208 third paragraph items 14–18.

coverage_explanation: The axioms capture the two main discriminating criteria: (1) the beverage is a residual 'other spirituous beverage' (modelled via OtherSpiritousBeverageMixtureQuality covering whisky-soda, tea with alcohol, spirit+juice mixtures and HS items 14–18), and (2) the container volume is greater than 2 litres (LargeContainer). Complement restrictions exclude the named sibling spirit types (arrack, plum/pear/cherry, other fruit spirit, liqueur, vodka, gin, whisky, grape wine/marc spirits) that occupy other CN codes under 2208 90. Coverage is reduced to 0.78 because: (a) the full enumeration of HS Explanatory Note items 14–18 is referenced but their individual product characteristics are not individually axiomatised in the ontology; (b) the sibling code 2208 90 56 (small container ≤ 2 l) shares the OtherSpiritousBeverageMixtureQuality and is distinguished only by container size — that disjointness is implicitly captured by the LargeContainer restriction but not by an explicit owl:disjointWith axiom between the two sibling classes; (c) rum/sugar-cane spirits (2208 40) complement is not listed because their quality class (RumSugarCaneSpiritOrganolepticQuality) is already excluded by virtue of different production process, but this is not stated explicitly.
